claim_summary: On May 30th, 2024, I dined in at this restaurant. Two friends were with me. We ordered Big Plate Whole Chicken. There was small bones in this cuisine I cracked one of my teeth immediately. I notified the staff and they apologized. I thought it was fine but then the pain increased so much more later that day and the second day. I then had to visit my dentist to extract the tooth because the dentist did an x-ray showing that the tooth was basically broken. July this year I did my dental implant for this missing tooth and it cost around $4500. I want to sue this restaurant to get compensated for the total cost of my dental treatment as well as emotional stress. Thus, I demand a total amount of $5500.
